text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe injures herself during training, so
I bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm sorry... I was being careless... and now I've
hurt myself...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: What was that? I should keep on training?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
No... but someone else did. Someone who seems
very... passionate...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It sounds like someone from the beyond is
communicating with Manhattan Cafe.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I need to "power through"? It's true, I'll need a
great deal more passion if I'm going to make this
work...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
With enough passion... Maybe I could make a
miracle happen...
choice_data_list: I can't let you run while you're injured.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
With enough passion... Maybe I could make a
miracle happen...
choice_data_list: I can't let you run while you're injured.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But... if I power through, I could...
choice_data_list:
You won't be running at all if your injury gets
worse.

You won't be running at all if your injury gets
worse.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're right... I'll pass on the message...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: They're... moved... and sorry for being mistaken...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
It makes me happy to hear you say that. I promise
I'll rest up...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I should power through... Okay...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...I'll show you how much power I—

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... It looks like I don't have enough passion to
make it happen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that I can't let her strain her injury any
further, I have Manhattan Cafe take some time
off to fully recover.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...What do you have in mind?
choice_data_list: Well, what are you feeling up for?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I think... I could do some studying, or stretching...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Would... those still count as "powering through"?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
...Very efficient. Doing what training I can... while
still letting myself recover...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...The passionate one likes your approach.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...Okay. I'll power through!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While putting her all into a manageable training
regimen, Manhattan Cafe heals up wonderfully.
